The '''Spiral mist-horn''' was an item of power discovered by [[Tionne Solusar]]. After tuning it, Tionne used the horn in the construction of her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' {{1st}}
